mode.title: Scrape Mode
mode.description: daily = new filings since last run (uses KVS last_run_date); historical = 365-day backfill

counties.title: Counties
counties.description: Counties to scrape. Valid values: Cuyahoga, Summit, Stark. Leave empty for all three.

types.title: Notice Types
types.description: Notice types to scrape. Valid values: foreclosure, probate. Leave empty for both.

since_date.title: Since Date (override)
since_date.description: Pull filings on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Overrides mode-based date window and the stored last_run_date in KVS.

use_residential_proxy.title: Route traffic through Apify residential proxy
use_residential_proxy.description: STRONGLY RECOMMENDED. Routes every HTTP call from every scraper (Playwright, requests, urllib) through Apify's RESIDENTIAL proxy group. Turning this off sends raw traffic from the Apify datacenter IP block — civil-authority portals may rate-limit or block repeat hits.

apify_proxy_url.title: Apify Proxy URL (direct override)
apify_proxy_url.description: Full proxy URL including password, e.g. http://groups-RESIDENTIAL:<password>@proxy.apify.com:8000 — copy from Apify Console → Proxy → Residential connection URL. When set, this bypasses the SDK's create_proxy_configuration() call (which hits the 'Proxy external access' gate). Leave empty to use the SDK path.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropic_api_key.description: API key for Claude Haiku. Enables obituary search + LLM field extraction. Optional but recommended — without it, probate records have no DM detection.

smarty_auth_id.title: Smarty Auth ID
smarty_auth_id.description: Smarty US-Address-Verification auth ID for address standardization + ZIP+4 + vacancy/RDI detection. Pairs with smarty_auth_token. Optional.

openwebninja_api_key.title: OpenWeb Ninja API Key (Zillow enrichment)
openwebninja_api_key.description: API key from openwebninja.com for Real-Time Zillow Data API. Adds MLS status, Zestimate, equity estimate, property type. Optional.

serper_api_key.title: Serper.dev API Key
serper_api_key.description: Google Search API. Used for DM address lookup via people-search sites. Optional.

firecrawl_api_key.title: Firecrawl API Key
firecrawl_api_key.description: JS-rendered scraping for people-search extraction. Optional.

tracerfy_api_key.title: Tracerfy API Key
tracerfy_api_key.description: Tracerfy skip trace for DP candidates (deceased owners, heirs, DMs). $0.02/record. Optional.

trestle_api_key.title: Trestle API Key
trestle_api_key.description: Phone validation scoring. Assigns 5-tier dial priority to phone numbers surfaced in DP reports. Optional.

aln_email.title: Akron Legal News Email
aln_email.description: Login for akronlegalnews.com — Summit County service-by-publication supplement (lis pendens). Optional; Summit scraper falls back to clerkweb-only without it.

datasift_email.title: DataSift Email
datasift_email.description: Login email for DataSift.ai (app.reisift.io). Exposed here for env-var parity; Apify actor does not auto-upload — generated DataSift CSVs are saved to KVS for manual upload at app.reisift.io → Upload File.

slack_webhook_url.title: Slack/Discord Webhook URL
slack_webhook_url.description: Webhook for run summary + DataSift CSV links + PDF links. Works with Slack incoming webhooks or Discord /slack endpoints.

google_drive_folder_id.title: Google Drive Folder ID
google_drive_folder_id.description: Drive folder ID for CSV + summary upload. Leave empty to skip.

google_service_account_key.title: Google Service Account Key (base64 JSON)
google_service_account_key.description: Base64-encoded service-account JSON for Drive upload. Required if google_drive_folder_id is set.

ms_graph_client_id.title: Microsoft Graph Client ID (OneDrive)
ms_graph_client_id.description: Azure AD App Registration Application (client) ID. Enables OneDrive upload of DataSift CSVs + Deep Prospecting PDFs. Paired with ms_graph_refresh_token. Leave empty to fall back to Apify KVS signed URLs.

ms_graph_refresh_token.title: Microsoft Graph Refresh Token (OneDrive)
ms_graph_refresh_token.description: Long-lived refresh token captured by running scripts/onedrive_auth.py once locally. Paired with ms_graph_client_id. Works as long as the actor runs at least once per 90 days (work/school account inactivity window).

run_tracerfy.title: Run Tracerfy Skip Trace
run_tracerfy.description: Run Tracerfy on deep-prospecting candidates (deceased owners / heirs / DMs). Requires tracerfy_api_key.

notify_slack.title: Send Slack Notification
notify_slack.description: Post run summary + DataSift CSV links + PDF links to slack_webhook_url.

include_vacant.title: Include Vacant Land
include_vacant.description: Keep vacant-land parcels (no house number). OFF by default.

include_commercial.title: Include Commercial Properties
include_commercial.description: Keep commercial parcels (Smarty RDI = Commercial). OFF by default.

include_entities.title: Include Entity-Owned Properties
include_entities.description: Keep LLC/Corp/Trust-owned records without filtering. OFF by default (entities removed unless a person is found behind them).
